SEARCH

Uses of Record Class
client.app.Navigator.Screen

Packages that use Navigator.Screen
Package
Description
client.app
Client-side application scaffolding: screen navigation and the in-memory session.
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.

    Method
    Description

    Returns the currently displayed screen, or null if none yet.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Registers a screen so it can later be navigated to by its id.
